---
title: "NYC Education Analytics"
subtitle: "Exploring Schools, Students, and Learning through Data"
format: html
---


# Welcome

This project explores NYC Open Data education datasets using R for statistical analysis and visualization. All analysis is written in Org-mode for literate programming and exported to Quarto for publishing.


## Data Sources

We use the [NYC Open Data Education Portal](https://data.cityofnewyork.us/browse?category=Education) which provides:

-   School locations and building information
-   Student enrollment and demographics
-   Test scores and academic performance
-   Graduation and dropout rates
-   Program participation data


## Getting Started

    # Load required packages
    source("src/R/setup.R")
    
    # Fetch school directory data
    schools <- fetch_dataset(NYC_DATA$school_directory)
    
    # Quick overview
    glimpse(schools)


## Project Structure

    edu-analytics/
    ├── org/                  # Org-mode source files
    │   ├── index.org
    │   ├── schools.org
    │   ├── students.org
    │   └── learning.org
    ├── src/R/               # R scripts and functions
    │   ├── setup.R          # Package loading
    │   ├── nyc_data.R       # NYC Open Data endpoints
    │   └── utils.R          # Helper functions
    ├── data/                # Local data cache (parquet)
    ├── output/              # Generated figures
    ├── docs/                # Quarto output (website)
    └── _quarto.yml          # Quarto configuration


## Quick Links

-   [Schools Analysis](schools.md) - Building space, locations, facilities
-   [Students Analysis](students.md) - Enrollment, demographics, attendance
-   [Learning Outcomes](learning.md) - Test scores, graduation rates, academic progress
